programme.title: Wendigo Demonic Evil
programme.desc: All over the world, strange yet true cannibal attacks have been occurring all whilst Zombies, Werewolves and Vampires are more popular than ever. The end times are truly here according to experts. programme.title: Nacho Mountain
programme.desc: Keefer has a talent. He can eat...A LOT. But it’s not until after getting fired from his job, finding his girl getting railed by a tranny and almost getting arrested for drug trafficking, that Keefer decides (with the help of his best friend Meegosh) to start an underground food eating competition. After the health crazed Mayor Fingstal and his cronies Officers Slivjack and Biggsley catch wind of it, all hell breaks loose. Then it all comes down to one final food battle from hell, THE NACHO MOUNTAIN! Set to a killer Stoner Rock soundtrack with loads of babes and crazy characters in the vein of Porky's and Meatballs, Nacho Mountain is sure to please those who have gotten beaten down, only to eat their way to the top!

programme.title: Almost Invisible: The Party's Over When You're Dead
programme.desc: To ease the weight of their college workload, unsuspecting teenagers seize the opportunity to turn their end-of-the-summer party into a house wrecking foray.The popular clique accepts an invite from the high school freak as an excuse to have the party of their lives and trash her parents house. What happens instead they will never forget. The freak turns them on to a world they never knew existed. In a tale about breaking free from the past, the teenagers are throttled into a strange and mysterious realm filled with murder and suicide. Beware unseen forces that exist in our daily lives, beware the Invisible.

programme.title: Coven of Evil
programme.desc: SHORT - A journalist invited to a ritual is magnetically drawn towards a mysterious young girl and the bizarre, deadly world of modern-day witchcraft.

programme.title: Paranormal Horrors of The True North
programme.desc: Canada has a rich and colorful history which has resulted in a variety of paranormal phenomena from coast to coast. Outdoor enthusiasts hiking the Bruce Trail in Ancaster, Ontario often find themselves at the remains of a once great mansion. Known as the Hermitage Ruins, visitors encounter two very different spirits on a regular basis. The first is a coachman who hung himself on the property and still carries the severed noose around his neck. The second apparition is a woman who once owned the mansion and loved it so much that she refused to leave even after it burned down. The “Espirit” is Montreal’s hottest nightclub. While it has had many names over the years, one thing has remained constant – it’s ghostly apparitions. During the latest renovations, many workers witnessed a large ball of light floating towards them, and even passing through them. Others saw the ghost of a woman, with a horrific scar running the length of her pale torso. The War of 1812 was a definitive moment in Canadian history, inflicting thousands of casualties. One fight in particular left an impression on Niagara Falls, Ontario. The Battle for Lundy’s Lane was so grueling; it claimed hundreds of lives in mere hours. At Drummond Hill Cemetery three such ghostly casualties remain; forever on duty watching the gates. Prepare for an exciting thrill ride to some of Canada's most haunted locations.

His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Ryan Nolan, a hardworking, talented play-maker with integrity and intelligence to match. Unfortunately, at only 5’ 9”, his size has kept him off of many coaches' radar. programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a versatile offensive lineman with an exceptional work ethic, already college football material. The challenge? programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode of Boom America dives headfirst into the businesses modernizing America’s energy and infrastructure landscape. The A-Team kicks things off with Switch It Up, breaking down how smart energy upgrades - like high-efficiency lighting, EV charging, and electrical modernization - are helping companies cut costs and stay competitive. Next, the focus shifts to Raida Tech, where the team highlights a company operating years ahead of the market but in need of sharper messaging to fully unlock its potential. From there, Tangible Assets, LLC takes center stage as the experts help refine its positioning, credibility, and growth strategy in a crowded investment space. Finally, New Home National Title gets a no-nonsense diagnostic as the team maps out a clear path to scale, increase visibility, and claim its place as a national contender. From practical innovation to bold business strategy, this episode proves that the future of American enterprise is powered by smart decisions and even smarter execution.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Six Monsters of poker with more than $60 million in combined career tournament earnings battle at Borgata Hotel Casino & Spa in the WPT Monster Invitational. programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Six Monsters of poker with more than $60 million in combined career tournament earnings compete at Borgata Hotel & Casino in the WPT Monster Invitational, and Vanessa Selbst commands the chip lead with three players remaining. programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour returns to Playground Poker Club in Montreal, Quebec, Canada, and 732 players compete for their share of the more than $2 million prize pool. Season XIII WPT Player of the Year Mukul Pahuja is at the final table, looking to finally etch his name on the coveted WPT Champions Cup™, and he is joined by fellow professionals Jonathan Jaffe, Kevin MacPhee, and local Sam Chartier.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Five players remain at the final table of WPT Montreal at Playground Poker Club. The winner will take home more than $400,000, along with a pair of Monster® 24K® headphones and a Hublot® King Power Unico Watch. Season XIII WPT Player of the Year Mukul Pahuja sits in third chip position, trailing chip leader Jonathan Jaffe and Ratharam Sivagnanam.

programme.title: S1E1 El Nino
programme.desc: Chasing El Niño follows Chris Benchetler on an epic skiing adventure from California’s Mammoth Mountain and the Sierra Nevada backcountry to the vast slopes of British Columbia. Joined by longtime friends Bryan Fox, Scotty Smith, and Canadian pro skier Nick McNutt, Chris explores previously inaccessible terrain, searches for perfect powder, and faces challenging weather conditions. Along the way, the crew embraces the joy of skiing, building creative jumps at their campsite and making the most of every moment on the mountain. This episode captures the thrill of exploration, friendship, and the relentless pursuit of epic lines.

programme.title: S1E2 El Nino
programme.desc: Chris Benchetler continues his epic skiing adventure from California’s Mammoth Mountain and the Sierra Nevada backcountry to the massive slopes of British Columbia. This time, X Games gold medalist Jossi Wells joins him for "The Sierra Trifecta," tackling skiing, climbing, and biking all in a single day. Chris and his crew hike 6,000 vertical feet through rugged rock fields to chase the last snow of the season in the Sierras, pushing their limits and capturing every thrilling moment.

programme.title: The Over-the-Hill Gang 1969
programme.desc: In The Over-the-Hill Gang, a group of retired Texas Rangers prove they’ve still got what it takes when they reunite to clean up a crooked frontier town. Led by Walter Brennan, with Edgar Buchanan, Chill Wills, and Andy Devine along for the ride, these aging lawmen may be past their prime, but their courage, wit, and six-guns make them a force to be reckoned with. Blending lighthearted comedy with classic Western action, this made-for-TV favorite delivers laughs, heart, and a reminder that true heroes never hang up their spurs.

programme.title: Weathering the Storm: Couple Faces Historic Tornado on Eve of Wedding
programme.desc: On December 10, 2021, a violent tornado outbreak hit western Kentucky. It was the deadliest weather event in the history of the Commonwealth. But as families faced a bleak holiday season, hope emerged in surprising ways.

programme.title: Sports Town Stories: Baltimore Invests in the Next Generation
programme.desc: From ice hockey to lacrosse to tennis, Baltimore coaches help drive the next generation to find family, inspiration and pride through sports.

programme.title: Crimes, Cons and Capers: White-Collar Crimes
programme.desc: These criminals may not have blood on their hands, but they still leave despair in their wake. From shady non-profits to fraudulent contractors, to wide-spread postal theft, here are some of the most devastating white-collar crimes to be attempted across the country.

programme.title: Local Love: Dapper Dater Suits Up to Find Timeless Love
programme.desc: Cody, a 35-year-old maestro of charm and style takes on the challenge of three blind dates. Will things sizzle in the kitchen with Helena, will a masterpiece be made with Kim or will he get a perfect score with Carley?
